sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, value NUMERIC(10, 5), created_at TIMESTAMP(3) WITH TIME ZONE);
INSERT INTO test_table (value, created_at) VALUES (42.4382, timestamp(3) with time zone '2020-09-28 18:40:05.123+02:00');
SELECT id, round(value, 2) AS rounded_value FROM test_table WHERE value > round(0.0, 2) AND created_at IS NOT NULL;

SELECT id, round(value, 3) AS rounded_value FROM test_table WHERE created_at BETWEEN timestamp(3) with time zone '2020-09-28 00:00:00+00:00' AND timestamp(3) with time zone '2020-09-30 23:59:59+00:00';
CREATE TABLE another_table (ref_id INT REFERENCES test_table(id), meta_value VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO another_table (ref_id, meta_value) VALUES (1, 'test1'), (1, NULL), (2, 'test2');
SELECT t.id, round(t.value, 2) AS rounded_value, a.meta_value FROM test_table t LEFT JOIN another_table a ON t.id = a.ref_id WHERE round(t.value, 2) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT t.id, round(t.value, 1) AS rounded_value FROM test_table t GROUP BY t.id HAVING round(t.value, 1) > 40;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_table AS SELECT round(value, 4) AS rounded_value FROM test_table WHERE created_at <= timestamp(3) with time zone '2020-09-30 23:59:59+00:00';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM temp_table WHERE rounded_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT MIN(round(value, 2)), MAX(round(value, 2)) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
